bullets: Owned end-to-end development of the National Portal of India (Next.js + FastAPI) — 3.5M+ monthly visitors, 7M+ pageviews, users across 10 countries.
Built full-stack features for the UPSC Online portal (Angular + FastAPI) supporting 900K+ Civil Services applicants/cycle — form submission, status tracking, and admit card workflows.
Designed real-time data pipeline monitoring: Kafka + Kafka Connect → Apache Iceberg → Trino → Superset dashboards with automated SLA breach alerting.
Led POC for FINO Payments Bank — migrating legacy PostgreSQL to Apache Iceberg open lakehouse over Trino, enabling analytical workloads and reducing operational memory footprint.
Maintained CI/CD pipelines with Docker/Podman and Kubernetes orchestration across staging and production environments.
Built a production collaborative web app solo — React + Material UI frontend with real-time Socket.IO sessions, Express.js + MongoDB backend with GCP file storage.
Implemented Redux Toolkit for multi-user state management with Firebase Auth and TypeScript end-to-end.
Delivered full-stack features with shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS frontend and Express.js REST APIs + MongoDB, following MVC architecture.
